records.question: Which customers have a billing address?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.address_type_code = 'Billing'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.address_type_code = 'Billing'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers

records.question: Which customers with the email rodriguez.nathanael@example.net and phone (773)971-9411x759 have used Credit Card as payment, placed UPS-shipped orders on or before 2008-10-23 06:42:10, lived at an address since 1975-12-24 10:01:37, and responded with an Order outcome?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net' AND customer_orders.shipping_method_code = 'UPS' AND customers.payment_method = 'Credit Card' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '1975-12-24 10:01:37' AND customer_orders.order_placed_datetime <= '2008-10-23 06:42:10' AND mailshot_customers.outcome_code = 'Order' AND customers.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T3 ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id INNER JOIN Mailshot_Customers AS T4 ON T1.customer_id = T4.customer_id WHERE T1.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net' AND T1.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759' AND T1.payment_method = 'Credit Card' AND T2.shipping_method_code = 'UPS' AND T2.order_placed_datetime <= '2008-10-23 06:42:10' AND T3.date_address_from >= '1975-12-24 10:01:37' AND T4.outcome_code = 'Order'

records.question: Who are the customers with payment method Direct Debit and phone number 1-878-600-7193x8180 who received a clothes campaign mailshot on 2018-03-15 15:43:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_campaigns ON mailshot_customers.mailshot_id = mailshot_campaigns.mailshot_id
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_phone = '1-878-600-7193x8180' AND mailshot_campaigns.product_category = 'clothes' AND mailshot_customers.mailshot_customer_date = '2018-03-15 15:43:14'

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers

WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Carlotta' AND mailshot_campaigns.mailshot_name = 'FED' AND customers.customer_address = '31932 Kailey Lodge' AND customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' AND mailshot_campaigns.product_category = 'food' AND customers.customer_email = 'fstanton@example.net' AND customers.customer_phone = '+66(7)1491041398' AND mailshot_customers.mailshot_customer_date <= '2018-03-06 21:21:38'

SELECT
  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
INNER JOIN Premises AS T3
  ON T2.premise_id = T3.premise_id
INNER JOIN Mailshot_Customers AS T4
  ON T1.customer_id = T4.customer_id
INNER JOIN Mailshot_Campaigns AS T5
  ON T4.mailshot_id = T5.mailshot_id
WHERE
  T1.customer_name = 'Carlotta' AND T1.customer_email = 'fstanton@example.net' AND T1.customer_phone = '+66(7)1491041398' AND T1.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' AND T3.premise_details = '31932 Kailey Lodge' AND T5.product_category = 'Food' AND T5.mailshot_name = 'FED' AND T4.mailshot_customer_date <= '2018-03-06 21:21:38'

JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to <= '2018-03-08 08:03:51' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from = '1975-12-24 10:01:37'

  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
WHERE
  T2.date_address_from = '1975-12-24 10:01:37' AND (
    T2.date_address_to IS NULL OR T2.date_address_to <= '2018-03-08 08:03:51'

      1
